title: aidia glabra
intro: Aidia glabra, also known as Phellia glabra, is a plant species in the Rubiaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Aidia glabra include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and even exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Aidia glabra is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
